summary: Completed testing of Detailed Items feature (name/description/quantity). All backend API tests pass (13/13). Frontend UI tests confirm CreatePostModal, CategorySelector, Feed, and UserProfileView components correctly handle detailed items with quantities displayed in parentheses.
passed_tests: Profile update API accepts detailed items with name/description/quantity format
Profile update API backward compatible with simple string items
Profile update handles mixed format items (strings and objects)
Profile update with detailed skills works correctly
Profile update with detailed services offering/wanted works correctly
Create post API accepts detailed items with name/description/quantity format
Create post API backward compatible with simple string items
Create post handles mixed format items
Feed endpoint returns items with proper structure
Matched posts endpoint works with detailed items
Empty list handling works correctly
Items with missing optional fields are normalized correctly
CreatePostModal opens and allows adding items
CreatePostModal edit button allows adding quantity and description
CreatePostModal displays item with quantity in parentheses after save
User Profile View modal opens from feed
User Profile View shows expandable sections for items
Profile page loads with CategorySelector components
Profile page shows items with quantities in parentheses
CategorySelector components present for goods, services, skills
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and clean up TEST_ prefixed posts. Demo user profile updated with detailed items via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Detailed items feature fully implemented and tested. Backend normalize_items() function converts both string and object formats to consistent {name, description, quantity} structure. Frontend components (Feed.js, UserProfileView.js, CreatePostModal.js, CategorySelector.js) all handle detailed items correctly, displaying quantities in parentheses on badges.

backend_detailed_items.details: normalize_items() helper correctly handles strings, objects, and mixed formats. Profile and Post APIs accept and persist detailed items.

frontend_create_post_modal.details: Edit button allows adding quantity and description. Item displays with quantity in parentheses after save.

frontend_feed_display.details: Feed displays items with quantities shown in parentheses on badges. Title attribute shows full details on hover.

frontend_user_profile_view.details: Profile modal shows expandable sections with detailed items. Clicking on items with details shows tooltip.

frontend_category_selector.details: CategorySelector on Profile page allows editing item details (quantity, description). Items display with quantities.

backward_compatibility.details: Old string-format items are automatically converted to object format with empty description/quantity fields.
